reviews.review_description: This game got shutdown because of hackers and revamps

I was an old moderator on this game, I was in the discord server for Zero’s new projects, but ju discord acc got lost and I had to make a new one, I currently don’t remember the name of the new game or anyone from that server’s account name, I’m Dizzy, again I was a moderator and I wish to be in contact with Zero again, sending something like a discord user name or server invite would be much appreciated, thank you.

reviews.review_description: Monki business V1 remake was getting worked on but sadly (zero the creator of the game) has cancelled all of his work he said he feels like it was just another gtag fan game and people didn't like V2's launch he felt like people took him for granted and so on (R.I.P monki business 2023-2025) goodbye fans and goodbye zero 👋🏻
It was fun till it all comes into an end.. sadly the game was discontinued and now they are working on something else or idk😔
